5310c468-c08f-4fff-adbc-187315d1ee1f.name: namespace
5310c468-c08f-4fff-adbc-187315d1ee1f.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%keda%'

fc485a69-7f45-49e7-919e-714dc2e03619.name: scaled_object
fc485a69-7f45-49e7-919e-714dc2e03619.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'scaledObject'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%keda%'

widgets.description: Number of active scaler objects in a time series graph.
widgets.title: Scaler Objects

widgets.description: The number of errors that have occurred for each ScaledObject.
widgets.title: ScaledObject Errors

widgets.description: The current value for each scaler’s metric that would be used by the HPA in computing the target average.
widgets.title: Scaler Metrics Value

widgets.description: The latency of retrieving current metric from each scaler.
widgets.title: Scaler Metrics Latency

widgets.description: Total number of triggers per trigger type.
widgets.title: Registered Triggers

widgets.description: Total number of KEDA custom resources per namespace for each custom resource type (CRD).
widgets.title: Registered Resources

widgets.description: Total deviation between the expected execution time and the actual execution time for the scaling loop. This latency could be produced due to accumulated scalers latencies or high load.
widgets.title: Scaling Loop Latency

widgets.description: This graph is available only if you have Cloud Event Source.
widgets.title: CloudEventSource - Events Emitted

widgets.description: This graph is available only if you have Cloud Event Source.
widgets.title: CloudEventSource - Events Queued

widgets.description: KEDA build_info gauge. Always 1 when the operator is reporting metrics. Use the legend to see version, git commit, and Go version.
widgets.title: Build Info

widgets.description: Errors per scaler (rate). High values indicate scaler source connection issues or query failures.
widgets.title: Scaler Errors

widgets.description: Aggregate scaler error rate across the selected namespace.
widgets.title: Total Scaler Errors
